name: KIT-10
short_description: KIT-10 is a charming arcade platformer inspired by '80s classics. Use your cat-like reflexes to collect repair items and save your fellow KITs. Stun enemies with your microwave meow and throw them into each other for big combos. Claw your way to the top of the leaderboard! Go KIT-10 go!
detailed_description:
KIT-10 is a charming arcade platformer inspired by classics from the mid '80s. Take control of KIT-10, the last operational KIT, to run, jump, meow, and throw your way through KITTI tower, save your fellow KITs, and stop the Katnipper invasion!

Featuring

  • 9 unique multi-screen stages across 3 distinct zones

  • 1 final boss showdown

  • 2 gameplay modes

  • Local and global leaderboards for bragging rights

  • Delightful mid-80s arcade graphics and sound

  • Catchy chiptunes sure to be stuck in your head for days

Story

Story for a 1980s arcade game? Sure, here goes...

The planet was peaceful, organized, and... boring. Citizens desired a little unpredictability in their lives. Thus was the Kinetic Independent Troublemaker (KIT) invented at the newly founded KIT Technical Institute (KITTI). These adorable little bots injected playful chaos into the world and became treasured companions of the people. Then, without warning, the Katnippers invaded. Recognizing the KITs as their biggest threat, they took over KITTI tower and knocked KITs 1-9 offline. It is up to the newest and most courageous model, KIT-10, to save the day and restore mostly organized peace!
